description: Create a new Python Flask web application project named 'hello_flask' at ~/PycharmProjects/hello_flask/ using the PyCharm GUI. The project must include an app.py file featuring a '/' route that returns 'Hello, World!' and a '/greet/<name>' route that returns 'Hello, {name}!'. Additionally, create a requirements.txt file with 'Flask' as a dependency and a test_app.py file containing at least two pytest functions. Execute the tests within the PyCharm environment. All files and the project structure must be created from scratch using the IDE's graphical interface rather than terminal commands.
